name: Knight's Night!
short_description: Knight's Night! — is a retro-style 1-bit platformer. Collect items, unlock new abilities, and make your way into the evil wizard's castle to save the kingdom!
detailed_description:
Knight's Night! — is a retro-style 1-bit platformer. Collect items, unlock new abilities, and make your way into the evil wizard's castle to save the kingdom!

The kingdom is in danger, and the power has fallen into the hands of an evil wizard. You are the one who must save everyone. Explore, face traps and enemies that await you. Use speed and wit on your journey. And don't forget to search for hidden items.

Features:
• Awesome 1-bit graphics! Black and white pixel art will immerse you in the atmosphere of a night journey, through light and shadows.
• Many different handmade levels! The levels are made with great attention to detail and are sure to pique your curiosity.
• Dangerous traps! On your way will meet unique enemies and several types of traps, to overcome which you need to act differently!
• Search the items! Don't forget to explore the levels and look for collectables!
